note: Hand-entered philadelphia one-off events (curated holiday programming, etc.). Stable id, real lat/lon, ISO local startDateTime/endDateTime with the local offset. Past events are filtered automatically.

events.title: Concilio's Annual Hispanic Fiesta 2026 at LOVE Park Philadelphia
events.description: Kick off Wawa Welcome America's July 4th festivities at this free, family-friendly Hispanic Fiesta in the heart of Philadelphia. Celebrate Latin culture, community, music, food and tradition at LOVE Park all afternoon and evening.

events.title: Summer Concert & Spectacular Waterfront Fireworks 2026 at Philadelphia's RiverRink
events.description: Bring the whole family to Penn's Landing for a free Yacht Rock concert capped by a spectacular fireworks display over the Delaware River. This Wawa Welcome America waterfront celebration is a perfect kickoff to July 4th weekend in Philadelphia.

events.title: Gospel On Independence 2026 at Independence Hall Philadelphia
events.description: Enjoy a free, soul-stirring evening of gospel music in front of historic Independence Hall during Wawa Welcome America. This family-friendly Philadelphia concert celebrates community and faith on the steps of American history.

events.title: Salute to Independence Semiquincentennial Parade 2026 in Philadelphia's Historic District
events.description: Line the streets of Philadelphia's Historic District for the largest professionally produced 250th anniversary parade in the nation. This free, all-ages July 4th weekend parade is a must-see civic spectacle for families.

events.title: 38th Annual Liberty Medal Ceremony 2026 at Independence Mall Philadelphia
events.description: Witness history at the free 38th annual Liberty Medal Ceremony on Independence Mall during Wawa Welcome America. Families can take in this patriotic Philadelphia tradition steps from where America was founded.

events.title: Pops on Independence 2026 Free Orchestral Concert in Philadelphia
events.description: Spread a blanket near Independence Hall for a free patriotic evening of live orchestral music celebrating America's 250th anniversary. Pops on Independence is a family-friendly Philadelphia July 4th weekend tradition.

events.title: Philadelphia July 4th 2026 Concert & Fireworks: One Philly Unity Concert on the Parkway
events.description: Cap off the Fourth of July at Philadelphia's free One Philly: Unity Concert for America on the Benjamin Franklin Parkway, the grand finale of Wawa Welcome America. The all-ages celebration culminates in a spectacular fireworks finale at 11:45 PM over the Philadelphia Museum of Art and skyline.

events.title: Camden Freedom Festival 2026: July 4th Fireworks & Commodores at Wiggins Park
events.description: Celebrate the Fourth of July free on the Camden Waterfront with the Camden County Freedom Festival, headlined by Motown legends the Commodores. Families can enjoy live music and a fireworks spectacular over the Delaware River at Wiggins Park.

events.title: Science History Institute Free Museum Day 2026 in Philadelphia
events.description: Explore science and history for free during Wawa Welcome America's Free Museum Day at the Science History Institute in Philadelphia's Old City. A hands-on, family-friendly stop for kids and parents over July 4th weekend.
